---
title: "Elisabeth Jane Forbes"
---

## Elisabeth Jane Forbes

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

Fifth and youngest daughter of William Forbes (1803-1891) of Medwyn and Mary Hume Archer Houblon (d.1896), niece of Alexander Penrose Forbes, Bishop of Brechin.  Her father was first cousin to Anne Mackenzie.  A Gosling as Thistle [2], and first cousin to Polypodium.  [Houblon Family;  LG 1952;  Faculty of Advocates]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7th [?1874[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
